mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, overtime_date, start_time, end_time, hours, reason, created_at, updated_at FROM overtime_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND (reason IS NULL OR reason NOT LIKE CONCAT(, '%')) ORDER BY overtime_date DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.hours), 0) FROM overtime_record o INNER JOIN employee e ON o.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(o.overtime_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND e.status = AND (o.reason IS NULL OR o.reason NOT LIKE CONCAT(, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO overtime_record (employee_id, overtime_date, start_time, end_time, reason) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{overtimeDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason})
mapper.update: UPDATE overtime_record SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, overtime_date = #{overtimeDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, reason = #{reason} WHERE id = #{id}
